name: Rolex Submariner Ceramic Bezel
description: A legendary diver's watch with a unidirectional rotatable bezel and Cerachrom ceramic insert. Water-resistant to 300 metres, powered by the calibre 3235 movement. A timeless icon of precision and luxury.

name: Rolex Datejust Stainless Steel
description: The quintessential dress watch. Features a classic Jubilee bracelet, Cyclops lens over the date, and a scratch-resistant sapphire crystal. A symbol of refined taste.

name: Rolex Cosmograph Daytona
description: Born for the race track, perfected for everyday luxury. The Daytona features a tachymetric scale and three chronograph counters. One of the most coveted watches in the world.

name: Rolex Yacht-Master
description: Designed for seafaring adventurers, the Yacht-Master combines nautical elegance with Rolex's uncompromising standards. Features a bidirectional rotatable bezel and supple Oysterflex bracelet.

name: Rolex Day-Date Rose Gold
description: The watch of presidents. Crafted in 18ct Everose gold, the Day-Date displays both the day and date. An emblem of achievement worn by world leaders and visionaries.

name: Hermes Birkin 30 Cacao
description: The ultimate status symbol in rich Cacao Togo leather. Hand-stitched by a single artisan in France, the Birkin 30 is more than a bag — it is a lifelong investment.

name: Hermes Birkin 30 Tin Alligator
description: Exceptional rarity in Tin Porosus Alligator leather. The luminous sheen and natural pattern of each scale make every piece one-of-a-kind.

name: Hermes Birkin 30 Caramel
description: A warm and versatile Caramel Clemence leather Birkin. Soft, supple, and scratch-resistant.

name: Hermes Birkin 30 Emerald Alligator
description: Deep Emerald Porosus Alligator with gold hardware. A jewel-toned statement piece that commands attention.

name: Hermes Birkin 30 Midnight Alligator
description: Midnight Blue Porosus Alligator with palladium hardware. Dramatic, sophisticated, and impossibly rare.

name: Gucci Wine n Dance Heels
description: Bold and theatrical, these Gucci heels in rich burgundy leather are made for the woman who commands every room. Featuring the iconic double-G hardware and signature stiletto heel.

name: Gucci Corporate Beige Flops
description: Effortless corporate luxury in nude beige. Crafted from supple calfskin with a padded footbed and the Gucci monogram discreetly embossed at the insole.

name: Gucci V Black Sandals
description: Sleek black leather sandals with a geometric V-strap silhouette and gold-toned Gucci buckle.

name: Chanel Classic Plaited Dress
description: An exquisite piece from Chanel's atelier featuring the house's signature plaited braid trim. Crafted from double-faced wool, this dress embodies understated Parisian chic.

name: Chanel Bosswoman Suit
description: Power and femininity in perfect balance. This iconic Chanel tweed suit features contrast trim, gold-toned buttons, and a structured silhouette. A wardrobe cornerstone for the modern woman.

name: Chanel Plaited Knit Sweater
description: Luxurious cashmere-blend knit with Chanel's signature plaited detailing at the cuffs and hem. Effortlessly elegant and impeccably soft — the definition of quiet luxury.

name: Cartier Love 18k Yellow Gold Bracelet
description: The iconic Cartier Love bracelet in 18k yellow gold. A symbol of eternal devotion, secured with a screwdriver — a timeless declaration of love worn by icons worldwide.

name: Bvlgari Serpenti Viper Bracelet 18k Rose Gold
description: The seductive Serpenti Viper bracelet in 18k rose gold with pave diamonds. Inspired by the sinuous form of a snake, it wraps around the wrist in a bold declaration of luxury.

name: Tiffany and Co. Return to Tiffany Silver Necklace
description: The iconic Return to Tiffany heart tag pendant in sterling silver. A beloved symbol of connection and the unmistakable Tiffany legacy, worn by generations of jewellery lovers.

name: Dior Pearl Drop Earrings
description: Delicate pearl drop earrings bearing the signature CD logo. Refined and feminine, these earrings embody the timeless elegance of the House of Dior with a modern pearl twist.

name: Chanel CC Pearl Ring
description: The iconic double-C motif reimagined as a lustrous pearl ring. A wearable piece of Chanel heritage that bridges classic couture with contemporary jewellery design.

name: Hermes Amulette Necklace
description: A minimalist rose gold pendant bearing the discreet Hermes H signature. Understated luxury at its finest — the perfect everyday talisman for the discerning collector.

name: YSL Classic Dark Shades
description: Sleek rectangular frames in matte black acetate with dark grey gradient lenses. The YSL monogram adorns each temple — understated luxury for the modern icon.

name: YSL Cat Print Shades
description: A bold cat-eye silhouette with the Saint Laurent logo in gold-toned hardware. Crafted in Italian acetate — the ultimate accessory for the fashion-forward woman.

name: YSL Snow Sunnies Midnight
description: Shield-style sunglasses in Midnight Black with mirrored lenses. Futuristic and fierce — a statement piece from Saint Laurent avant-garde eyewear line.

name: YSL Snow Sunnies Sunlight
description: The same iconic shield silhouette in gold-tinted lenses with a champagne frame. Luminous and commanding — made for those who prefer their luxury sun-kissed.

name: Chanel Mini Classic Handbag
description: The iconic Chanel Classic Flap in mini size, crafted from lambskin leather with gold-toned hardware. A timeless investment piece that transcends every season.

name: Loewe Puzzle Bag Sage Green
description: The architectural Puzzle bag in soft sage green calfskin. Loewe's most iconic silhouette — geometric, functional, and unmistakably modern.

name: Louis Vuitton Speedy Bandouliere 20
description: The compact Speedy Bandouliere in the signature Monogram canvas with a detachable shoulder strap. A wardrobe staple reimagined for the contemporary woman.

name: Miu Miu Wander Hobo Bag
description: The Wander hobo in soft matelasse nappa leather with Miu Miu's signature ruching. Effortlessly chic and unmistakably feminine.

name: Saint Laurent Le 5 A 7 Hobo
description: The Le 5 A 7 in smooth black leather with a sleek crescent silhouette. A modern Saint Laurent icon that moves effortlessly from day to evening.

name: Gucci Belt with Interlocking G Buckle
description: The iconic Gucci belt in black leather with the signature interlocking G buckle in palladium-toned hardware. A versatile accessory that elevates any outfit with a touch of Italian luxury.

name: Gucci Reversible Belt with Interlocking G Buckle
description: The ultimate in versatility, this reversible Gucci belt features the iconic interlocking G buckle in palladium-toned hardware. One side in classic black leather, the other in rich brown.

name: Celine Triomphe Cap in Cotton Canvas
description: The Triomphe cap in durable cotton canvas with the signature Celine Triomphe motif embroidered on the front. A stylish and practical accessory for sunny days.

name: Miu Miu Denim Baseball Cap in Beige Amaranth
description: A classic baseball cap in soft denim with the signature Miu Miu logo on the front. Perfect for adding a touch of effortless style to any casual outfit.

name: Dior B23 League Low-Top Sneaker
description: The Dior B23 League low-top sneaker in premium leather with the signature Dior logo. A versatile and comfortable choice for everyday wear.

name: Dior B23 League High-Top Sneaker
description: The Dior B23 League high-top sneaker in premium leather with the signature Dior logo. A versatile and comfortable choice for everyday wear.

name: Louis Vuitton Flared Sleeve Lavalliare Blouse
description: The iconic Louis Vuitton flared sleeve lavalliare blouse in premium cotton with the signature LV monogram. A timeless piece that combines elegance with modern sophistication.

name: Prada Cropped Cotton Cardigan
description: A chic cropped cardigan in soft cotton with Prada's signature logo buttons. Perfect for layering or wearing on its own for a touch of understated luxury.
